---
pagetitle: "Yojiro Ito"
---

```{=html}
<header class="hero-header">
  <div class="hero-bg" aria-hidden="true"></div>
  <div class="hero-inner">
    <h1 class="hero-title">Yojiro Ito</h1>
  </div>
</header>
```

I am an economist at the Bank of Japan and a Ph.D. student at Waseda University.

You can view my [CV](cv.pdf) here.

::: {.gs-heading}
Publications:
:::

* [The Impact of Mergers on Aggregate Productivity: An Empirical Analysis Using Productivity Decomposition](https://doi.org/10.1093/icc/dtaf032) (with Daisuke Miyakawa), *Industrial and Corporate Change*, Advance Article, 2025.

::: {.gs-heading}
Working Papers:
:::

* [Product and Process Innovation: Determinants and Dynamic Effects on Firm Growth](https://www.imes.boj.or.jp/research/papers/english/25-E-18.pdf) (with Harumasa Shirakawa), IMES Discussion Paper Series No. 2025-E-18, 2025.
* [Potential Growth in Japan: Issues on Its Relationship with Prices and Wages](https://www.boj.or.jp/en/research/wps_rev/wps_2024/data/wp24e16.pdf) (with Ichiro Fukunaga, Yoshihiko Hogen, Kenji Kanai, and Satoshi Tsuchida), Bank of Japan Working Paper Series No. 24-E-16, 2024.
* [Determinants of Price Markups at Japanese Firms and Implications for Productivity](https://www.boj.or.jp/en/research/wps_rev/wps_2024/data/wp24e15.pdf) (with Kosuke Aoki, Yoshihiko Hogen, Kenji Kanai, and Kosuke Takatomi), Bank of Japan Working Paper Series No. 24-E-15, 2024.
* [Changes in the Global Economic Landscape and Issues for Japan's Economy](https://www.boj.or.jp/en/research/wps_rev/wps_2024/data/wp24e03.pdf) (with Yoshihiko Hogen, Kenji Kanai, and Naoya Kishi), Bank of Japan Working Paper Series No. 24-E-3, 2024.
* [Pricing Patterns over Product Life-Cycle and Quality Growth at Product Turnover: Empirical Evidence from Japan](https://www.boj.or.jp/en/research/wps_rev/wps_2016/data/wp16e05.pdf) (with Nobuhiro Abe, Ko Munakata, Shinsuke Ohyama, and Kimiaki Shinozaki), Bank of Japan Working Paper Series No. 16-E-5, 2016.

::: {.gs-heading}
Works in Progress:
:::

* Supply and Demand Shocks, Global Value Chains, and Inflation: Evidence from Trade Microdata, with Harumasa Shirakawa
* Investment Behavior over Firm and CEO Life Cycles, with Daisuke Miyakawa.
* Merger Patterns, Costly Exit, and Aggregate Implications.

```{=html}
<script>
(function () {
  var hero = document.querySelector('.hero-header');
  var bg   = hero && hero.querySelector('.hero-bg');
  if (!bg) return;

  if (window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches) return;

  var SPEED = 0.35;                       // 0 = 動かない / 1 = 完全固定に見える
  var MAX   = parseFloat(
    getComputedStyle(document.documentElement)
      .getPropertyValue('--hero-parallax')
  ) || 120;

  var ticking = false;

  function update() {
    var y = window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop || 0;
    var offset = Math.min(Math.max(y * SPEED, 0), MAX);
    bg.style.transform = 'translate3d(0,' + offset.toFixed(2) + 'px,0)';
    ticking = false;
  }

  window.addEventListener('scroll', function () {
    if (!ticking) { ticking = true; requestAnimationFrame(update); }
  }, { passive: true });

  window.addEventListener('resize', update, { passive: true });
  update();
})();
</script>
```
